author_identification.canonical_name_ar: أبو زكريا محيي الدين يحيى بن شرف النووي
author_identification.scholarly_standing: Prominent Shafi'i jurist, hadith scholar, and spiritual writer, widely respected for his works on Islamic practice and piety.

scholarly_context.tradition_position: A well-known work on Islamic devotion and remembrance, widely used in Sunni spiritual practice.
scholarly_context.historical_significance: One of the most popular and enduring works on dhikr (remembrance of God) in the Islamic tradition.
scholarly_context.muhaqiq_reputation: عبد القادر الأرنؤوط is a respected modern editor known for his careful work on classical Islamic texts.
